query: Bran Castle Ski Marathon cross country ski race Bran

videos.title: Transylvania 100 / Ultratrail 2019
videos.description:
For all the runners and volunteers who joined me on the run, big thanks to all of you, it was an awesome experience. After starting at Dracula's Castle in Bran, we followed the narrow trails through the stunning landscape of Transylvania. We climbed rough mountains, crossed wild rivers and left our footprints into the melting snow. For me, it took 10 hours 30 minutes to reach the finish line after 50k and 3415m of altitude.

#checkthisoutmatti

Find me on instagram ;) instagram.com/lomografix

videos.title: MEGAVALANCHE 2025 💥 From 100th to the PODIUM 😤 | SURVIVING the Full Race X Kilian BRON
videos.description:
My Full Run of the MEGAVALANCHE 2025 👊
Subscribe for more videos | Kilian BRON ► http://bit.ly/kilianbron
Instagram ► http://bit.ly/kilianbronIG
Strava run ► https://bit.ly/StravaMEGA25
Bike ► https://bit.ly/CommencalMETAV5

❄️ Dropping in from Pic Blanc at 3,300m, the Megavalanche is pure chaos. It’s you, your bike, and 350 riders fighting each others.

I took risks right from the start. It was a 50/50 gamble, but it paid off. Somehow, I stayed on my bike the whole way. No real plan, just instinct, anticipation, and trying to read the chaos around me.

It was one of the most stressful starts I’ve ever faced. But if I had to sum up my race in one word: REMONTADA.

🙏 Massive respect to all the riders, organizers, volunteers, and the crowd. The 30th Megavalanche was legendary.


#MEGAVALANCHE #KilianBron  #GoPro #POV #run #massstart #race #downhill #battle
..
With the support of COMMENCAL BIKES, Shimano, Fox, Thule, Tissot, Skoda, Schwalbe tires, GoPro, Private Sport Shop, 100%, La Clusaz, Renthal, Fizik, HT, KS, Slicy, DT Swiss, OneUp, Silva
